question: What is the position of the houses in this image? Select from the following options: (A) They are in the center of the image. (B) They are on the right side of the image. (C) They are on the left side of the image. (D) They are not visible in the image.
gold_answer: They are on the left side of the image
answer_choices: They are in the center of the image
They are on the right side of the image
They are on the left side of the image
They are not visible in the image
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
